title: Retries, Idempotency, Compensation, and Recovery · Operations Recall
summary: Harden a loop that calls unreliable external services. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a fault-injected recovery harness after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use bounded retries with backoff and error classification.
Design idempotent operations and deduplication for repeated requests.
Checkpoint durable state so a process can restart without replaying completed effects.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Bounded agent-loop portfolio. No external effects occur in this browser lab."""

steps.instruction: Order the Retry Policy evidence cycle before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Retry Policy assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Use bounded retries with backoff and error classification. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: loops retries idempotency. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Retry Policy, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a fault-injected recovery harness.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Immediate unlimited retries maximize reliability. This fails the Retry Policy contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

stimulus.title: Recovery Tests case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: loops retries idempotency. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk

lines.label: evidence

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Recovery Tests applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Inject timeouts, partial failures, duplicates, and restarts into loop tests.
